headline: Meta’s AI Woes Aren’t a Unique Problem Within the Magnificent Seven
summary: Artificial intelligence has been a persistent sticking point for  Meta Platforms  but its problems compared with the other Magnificent Seven stocks have been greatly exaggerated.  Meta stock tumbled 3.8% on Friday on a report that the Facebook and Instagram parent was delaying the release of its upcoming AI model after it failed to perform as well as rivals.  Meta may even consider temporarily licensing Google’s Gemini for use in its products, the  New York Times  reported, citing unnamed sources.

headline: NVIDIA Joins OCI To Shape Optical Links And AI Data Center Future
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) has co founded the Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) Multi Source Agreement to define open standards for optical links in AI data centers. The consortium includes AMD, Broadcom, Meta, Microsoft, and OpenAI, aiming to create interoperable, high density optical interconnects. The group intends to address copper connectivity bottlenecks and support much larger AI clusters for future workloads. NVIDIA enters this effort with a strong market profile and a current share...

headline: Broadcom’s OCI Push Puts AI Data Center Role In Focus
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced a 400G/lane optical DSP and is leading the new Optical Compute Interconnect, or OCI, open standard alongside AMD, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, and OpenAI. The company is also working with JetCool and Flex to bring production-ready liquid cooling solutions into AI data center deployments. These developments aim to support hyperscalable AI clusters with multivendor optical connectivity and advanced thermal management. Broadcom is widely known for its...

headline: Meta Faces AI Setback And Child Safety Pressure Testing Growth Story
summary: Meta Platforms (NasdaqGS:META) has delayed the launch of its flagship generative AI model, internally known as "Avocado", after tests showed it trailing rival offerings. At the same time, UK authorities are increasing pressure on Meta to introduce stronger protections for children on Facebook and Instagram, including tougher age checks and safety tools. Regulators in the UK are signaling potential fines if Meta does not address concerns around underage users and harmful content on its...
